allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\Claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude"; Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\Claude"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:11434/api/tags" -TimeoutSec 3; "Ollama running. Models: " + \($r.models | ForEach-Object { $_.name } | Join-String -Separator ", "\) } catch { "Ollama not running: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:11434/api/tags" -TimeoutSec 3; "Ollama running. Models: " + \(\($r.models | ForEach-Object { $_.name }\) -join ", "\) } catch { "Ollama not running" })
